overall.description: Cinematic gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through Night City's neon-lit downtown district. The camera follows a character walking along elevated sidewalks past towering skyscrapers covered in holographic advertisements, with moderate vehicle traffic and sparse pedestrians visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway under massive connecting archway

events.description: camera lowers from upward angle to level walking perspective and begins moving forward along the elevated walkway

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along an elevated sidewalk beneath a massive architectural archway, surrounded by towering skyscrapers and holographic advertisements

notable_agents.action: distant figure walking ahead on the same elevated path

entered.detail: futuristic mega-structure connecting two skyscrapers with prominent green neon signage on top
large illuminated billboard displaying COLA advertisement with male figure in monochrome
multiple purple and pink holographic billboards featuring animated female characters
raised pedestrian walkway with metal railings overlooking the multi-lane street below
tall dark glass buildings with scattered illuminated windows rising into the night sky

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a dramatic upward view of Night City's skyline dominated by a massive connecting archway between skyscrapers. The camera then transitions to a walking perspective along an elevated sidewalk, passing neon billboards for Cola and anime characters while moving toward the archway structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: downtown commercial street with heavy signage and moderate traffic

events.description: massive archway structure passes to the left and exits the field of view, opening up the street perspective
multiple futuristic vehicles pass by on the left side of the walkway, increasing traffic density

agents.ego_description: continuing forward along the elevated walkway as the environment transitions from under the archway to a more open street view with passing traffic

notable_agents.action: futuristic black sedan driving along the multi-lane road with headlights on
person in dark clothing walking ahead on the sidewalk, gradually getting closer

entered.detail: blue neon billboard displaying CIRRUS text in bright cyan lighting
vertical corporate signage for Kiroshi with distinctive yellow logo
tall infrastructure pole with traffic signals and attached neon light strips

segments.scene_description: As the character moves past the massive archway, the view opens to reveal more of the street level with moderate traffic. New corporate signage for Cirrus and Kiroshi becomes visible on the buildings, while the Cola billboard shifts to the right side of the frame. Vehicles regularly pass by on the left as the walkway continues forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy downtown intersection approach with dense pedestrian activity

events.description: pedestrian density increases significantly as approaching a busy intersection area
slight turn to the right while maintaining forward momentum, navigating around other pedestrians

agents.ego_description: navigating through a busier section of the sidewalk with increased pedestrian traffic and approaching an intersection with traffic infrastructure

notable_agents.action: person in light-colored jacket and white hat walking alongside the railing
dark SUV with brake lights illuminated, slowing down in traffic

entered.detail: traffic signal infrastructure with multiple lights and control boxes at street corner
lit commercial entrances and shop facades at street level with glowing signage

segments.scene_description: The final segment approaches a busy downtown intersection with increased pedestrian activity. The camera navigates past other walkers while traffic continues to flow on the left. The Cola billboard becomes prominent again in the center view, and new ground-level storefronts become visible as the elevated walkway descends to street level.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that begins with a towering view of the skyline and gradually descends into the bustling activity of a street-level intersection. It begins with a dramatic upward gaze at a massive connecting archway between skyscrapers before transitioning to a walking perspective along an elevated sidewalk lined with neon billboards for Cola and anime characters. As the camera passes beneath the archway, the view opens to reveal corporate signage for Cirrus and Kiroshi and a steady flow of vehicle traffic passing on the left. The scene then shifts toward a busy downtown hub where pedestrian activity increases, with the Cola billboard returning to center view as the walkway finally descends to meet the ground-level storefronts.
